content_clean: By Louisiana's GOP governor just declared a STATE OF EMERGENCY to CANCEL an election. Not for a storm -- but to redraw maps so he can ERASE a historically Black district, They're not even hiding it. MAGA is rigging elections to silence YOU. By Postponing an election just before early voting begins so you can redraw the map to disenfranchise black and brown voters is as racist as it gets.

🟢 Diplomatic Statement | 7/10 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump: Iran offering bad deal, US may not make a deal U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran is offering a bad deal and it might be better if the U.S. doesn't make a deal with them. He mentioned being busy with Iranians calling to make a good deal, but the U.S. won't let that happen. Trump emphasized that the negotiations are ongoing, but the terms proposed by Tehran are unfavorable. The American leader reiterated that Washington will not accept a deal that does not serve its interests. This signals a potential breakdown in diplomatic efforts if Iran does not improve its offer.
